description: A portfolio snapshot — holdings from a connected brokerage or exchange at a point in time. Produced by Ophan's get_portfolio tool.

context_schema.holdings: object[] — [{symbol: string, quantity: string, average_cost: string, current_price: string, market_value: string}]
context_schema.total_value: string — total portfolio value as a decimal string
context_schema.snapshot_at: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of the snapshot

ui.label: Portfolio
ui.description: Portfolio snapshot — holdings, values, and allocation from a connected exchange.
